name: 鲍伊猎刀（★） | 人工染色
nameZh: 鲍伊猎刀（★） | 人工染色
descriptionEn: This full-tang sawback Bowie knife is designed for heavy use in brutal survival situations. It has been given a forced patina using lemon and mustard dripped onto the surface. If you think it's messy now, wait until you see it under a blacklight
descriptionZh: 这把全龙骨锯齿的鲍伊猎刀是专为在残酷的生存环境中大量使用而设计的。 通过将柠檬汁和芥末滴到这把武器的表面，它被人工地附上了氧化层。 你也许以为刀刃上一团糟，请在黑光灯源下瞧瞧吧
